values.content: You are an expert business consultant. Always respond with valid JSON only. Never add explanations outside the JSON block.

=You are a business analyst AI. Analyze the following customer reviews for "{{ $('Webhook').item.json.body.business_name }}" and generate a structured JSON report.

Customer Reviews:
{{ $('Webhook').item.json.body.reviews.join('\n- ') }}

Return ONLY valid JSON, no extra text:
{
  "business_name": "...",
  "overall_sentiment": "positive/neutral/negative",
  "customer_complaints": ["complaint 1", "complaint 2"],
  "customer_likes": ["like 1", "like 2"],
  "business_opportunities": ["opportunity 1", "opportunity 2"],
  "report": {
    "business_problem": "2-3 sentence summary of main problems",
    "growth_suggestion": "Specific actionable growth advice",
    "marketing_idea": "Creative marketing idea based on what customers love",
    "opportunity_detection": "A new revenue opportunity being missed"
  }
}

parameters.subject: =Analysis Report for {{$json.business_name}}
parameters.message:
=

🚀 AI Business Growth Advisor

We analyzed the recent feedback for {{$json.business_name}}. Here is the strategic breakdown:

📉 Critical Complaints

  • {{$json.customer_complaints.join('
  • ')}}

💡 The "Big Idea" (Marketing)

{{$json.report.marketing_idea}}

📈 Growth Strategy

{{$json.report.growth_suggestion}}

Generated automatically by your n8n AI Agent.
